introSection: Mighty Mouse was a steel wild mouse roller coaster built by US manufacturer Miler Manufacturing previously located at Funtown Pier in Seaside Park, New Jersey, USA. The attraction was destroyed on October 29, 2012, when Hurricane Sandy washed away the pier.
fullText:
Mighty Mouse was a steel wild mouse roller coaster built by US manufacturer Miler Manufacturing previously located at Funtown Pier in Seaside Park, New Jersey, USA. The attraction was destroyed on October 29, 2012, when Hurricane Sandy washed away the pier.





Unpainted track and supports.

Pink track and unpainted supports.
